narrative:
Union Township L (precinct in Clermont County) has 945 registered voters, with 65.9% unaffiliated or lacking primary history. Republican-leaning voters make up 19.4% of registrants and Democratic-leaning voters account for 14.7%, a modest Republican lean of 4.7 percentage points.
